title: デビュー戦の後に・そして明星は

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
I can pass her, I can pass her, I can pass her!
HAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text: As if I'll let you! GRAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (My racing spirit is surging...)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're coming up to the fourth corner! Which of
our racers will be the first to break away?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Go! Go! Gooo!
You can do iiit!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(The cheering, the roaring, the trembling
ground...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(...Hot! It's so hot! I feel like I'm burning... like my
soul is on fire!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're having fun... right? You want to do this.
You want to keep going... further... and faster
than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (But since you can't... I will!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: HRAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So, this... is the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Yeah... It's incredible...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(It was fun. My chest is pounding. I feel content.
That was the best ever... the very best...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I feel like I've been... forgiven.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! Her name was Admire Vega, wasn't it?
That sprint down the final stretch was
unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Check out this article! Her mom became a Double
Tiara champion during her career. I bet her
daughter will go on to turn heads too!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's my Ayabe! Place a lotus and laurel upon
her honorable head! Haah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
She's getting so much attention, and so soon!
Whether it's because of her mom or what the
crowd sees in her, she's showing them she's got
what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: And I'm going to do the same!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega returns to the tunnel amidst the
sound of rapturous applause and cheers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems completely apathetic to all the
attention she's drawn thanks to the potential she
displayed.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We have to discuss where to set my sights for my
next race.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm aiming for the very top, the G1s...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So, I want to take on the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But you're my trainer... What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to think about this. She has more than
enough skill and aptitude for a 2,000-meter race
on turf. However, more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega stares at me with eyes full of
determination. If she's as serious as she looks,
then...
choice_data_list: All right, let's shoot for the Hopeful Stakes.
All right, let's shoot for the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Good, then that's that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, our next goal is set. She'll be
taking on the Hopeful Stakes—a junior-year G1
race where promising new stars assemble!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We leave Kyoto Racecourse and, after a few
hours riding the bullet train, arrive back at the
academy. Admire Vega shows little indication of
being tired.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: About training going forward...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to run in a junior-year G1 race. Or...
actually, my goal is to win it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So, you can go ahead and put pressure on me.
Promise me you won't hold back.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll see you then.
choice_data_list: All right. Take care heading back.
All right. Take care heading back.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I have to move forward—to rise in status. I have
to reach even greater glory... for her.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
As enjoyable as today was... I need to show her an
even better race.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If I became a shooting star and granted your wish,
would you be happy?
That was so much fun, wasn't it?

I think so anyway. I loved every single minute of
it...
Wasn't that fun, Big Sis?
